name: First United Methodist Church
description: Come play pickleball at First United Methodist Church in Sylva, NC! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Liston B. Ramsey Regional Activity Center
description: Come play pickleball at Liston B. Ramsey Regional Activity Center in Cullowhee, NC! There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Mark Watson Park
description: Mark Watson Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sylva, NC. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Sapphire Valley Resort
description: Sapphire Valley Resort is a place to play pickleball in Sapphire, NC. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, and water. A one-time fee is required to play.
